## RushConstants.globalPluginCommandKind property

> This API is provided as a beta preview for developers and may change based on feedback that we receive. Do not use this API in a production environment.
> 

The value of the "commandKind" property for a plugin-only global command in command-line.json. This command kind can only be used in command-line.json files provided by Rush plugins.

**Signature:**

```typescript
static readonly globalPluginCommandKind: 'globalPlugin';
```
